vo_text: Born on July 13? Your card is the 2 of Diamonds — and its shadow side explains a lot. In Cardology it's called The Financial Partner. You're the resource negotiator. You understand value exchange and partnership in material terms. The shadow side? You lose yourself in material partnerships. You give too much to maintain the relationship. Your gift? Natural understanding of fair exchange. Plus ability to create balanced partnerships around resources. You're learning to ask for what you need materially. Find your own card free — link in bio. Card Blueprints.

vo_phrases.text: You lose yourself in material partnerships.

title: Born July 13? Your Birth Card Is the 2 of Diamonds #shorts
caption:
Born on July 13, your Cardology birth card is the 2 of Diamonds.
A mirror, not a forecast. Find your own card free at cardblueprints.com.
